description: Add a comment to a Jira issue

issue_key.description: The key of the issue to comment on (e.g. WEBAPP-123).

body.description: The text of the comment. Supports Atlassian Document Format (ADF).

type.description: Whether visibility of this item is restricted to a role or group.

value.description: The name of the role or group that visibility of this item is restricted to.
